title: Park Ranger

rationales.taskAutomation: Patrol, visitor safety response, search-and-rescue, and interpretive education happen outdoors in unstructured environments AI cannot perform.
rationales.toolMaturity: Camera-trap and wildlife-monitoring analytics exist but are research-grade tools, not a mature standard toolchain for ranger work.
rationales.adoption: Park agencies are small, chronically underfunded government employers with little budget for new AI tooling.
rationales.agenticExposure: The role is overwhelmingly physical fieldwork in remote, unstructured terrain that autonomous software has no way to reach.

tasksGrowing: In-person interpretive education and wildlife-conflict response
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 19-1031 (closest detailed occupation), p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: Wildlife-monitoring analytics and camera-trap data tools

insight: Among the least automatable roles in this index; the job exists precisely where digital tools don't reach.
